name: iShares Dow Jones Eurozone Sustainability Screened UCITS ETF (DE)
summary: The iShares Dow Jones Eurozone Sustainability Screened UCITS ETF (DE) aims to track the performance of the Dow Jones Eurozone Sustainability Screened Index, which is composed of Eurozone companies that meet specific environmental, social, and governance (ESG) criteria. It provides investors with exposure to sustainable companies within the Eurozone equity market. The ETF is domiciled in Germany and managed by BlackRock Asset Management Deutschland AG.

name: iShares GlobSelDivid UCITS ETF
summary: The iShares GlobSelDivid UCITS ETF seeks to track the performance of an index composed of high dividend-paying equities from around the world, screened for quality and sustainability. The fund aims to provide investors with a diversified portfolio of dividend-paying stocks globally. The ETF is managed by iShares.

name: Hanetf Icav - Climate Global Decarbonisation Enablers Ucits Etf
summary: The HANetf Climate Global Decarbonisation Enablers UCITS ETF, managed by Hanetf Icav, focuses on companies that are enabling the transition to a low-carbon economy. This ETF invests in firms providing technologies and services related to renewable energy, energy efficiency, and sustainable transportation. It is UCITS compliant and listed on the Vienna Stock Exchange.

name: Hanetf ICAV - Hanetf Alternative Medicine Ucits ETF
summary: The HANetf Alternative Medicine UCITS ETF, managed by Hanetf ICAV, invests in companies involved in the alternative medicine industry. This includes firms engaged in the production, research, and development of products and services related to herbal medicine, supplements, and related wellness areas. It is UCITS compliant and listed on the Vienna Stock Exchange.

name: L&G Battery ValChain UCITS ETF
summary: The L&G Battery ValChain UCITS ETF is an exchange-traded fund. It aims to track the performance of an index representing companies involved in the battery and energy storage solutions, and electric vehicle sectors. It is managed by Legal & General Investment Management (LGIM).

name: Legal & General UCITS ETF Plc - L&G Cyber Security UCITS ETF
summary: The L&G Cyber Security UCITS ETF is an exchange-traded fund. It seeks to track the performance of an index composed of companies involved in the cyber security industry. It is managed by Legal & General Investment Management (LGIM).

name: GO Robotics Autom UCITS ETF
summary: GO Robotics Autom UCITS ETF is an exchange-traded fund domiciled in Ireland. The ETF aims to track the investment results of the EQM Global Robotics and Automation UCITS Index, providing exposure to companies involved in robotics and automation. The ETF allows investors to participate in the growth potential of the robotics and automation industry through a diversified portfolio of stocks.

name: Legal & General UCITS ETF Plc - L&G Russell 2000 US Small Cap UCITS ETF
summary: The L&G Russell 2000 US Small Cap UCITS ETF is an exchange-traded fund. It aims to track the performance of the Russell 2000 index, which represents small-cap US companies. It is managed by Legal & General Investment Management (LGIM).

name: Lyxor Euro Stoxx 50 (DR) UCITS ETF Acc
summary: The Lyxor EURO STOXX 50 (DR) UCITS ETF is a UCITS compliant exchange traded fund that aims to track the benchmark index EURO STOXX 50 Net Return EUR, offsetting the impact of daily variations of the index local currency vs. the USD. The USD-hedged share class offers the simplicity of a daily currency hedge mechanism that is embedded in the investment product, representing an efficient solution to manage the foreign-exchange risk.The EURO STOXX 50 Net Return EUR is Europe's leading Blue-chip index for the Eurozone providing a Blue-chip representation of supersector leaders in the Eurozone from 50 stocks and over 12 Eurozone countries. It captures approximately 60% of the free float market capitalisation of the EURO STOXX Total Market Index (TMI), which in turn covers approximately 95% of the free float market capitalisation of the represented countries. More information on www.stoxx.com.

name: Lyxor Dow Jones Industrial Average UCITS ETF Dist
summary: The Lyxor Dow Jones Industrial Average UCITS ETF is a UCITS compliant exchange traded fund that aims to track the benchmark index Dow Jones Industrial Average Net Total Return.The Dow Jones Industrial Average Net Total Return represents large and well-known U.S. companies, covering all industries with the exception of Transportation and Utilities. The Dow Jones Industrial Average is a price-weighted index. The Dow Jones Industrial Average is an index based on the values of 30 securities of large American companies. It is calculated using a mathematical average of the stock prices of the 30 securities. The capitalisation of the shares included in the Dow Jones Industrial Average represents approximately 20% of the capitalisation of American equities. The index is price weighted.Lyxor ETFs are efficient investment vehicles listed on exchange that offer transparent, liquid and low-cost exposure to the underlying benchmark index.

name: Multi Units Luxembourg - Lyxor DAX (DR) UCITS ETF
summary: This is an exchange-traded fund (ETF) that tracks the performance of the DAX index, providing exposure to the largest and most liquid German companies. The fund is managed by Lyxor and is UCITS compliant, meaning it adheres to European regulations for investment funds. The ETF aims to replicate the index as closely as possible using a direct replication strategy.

name: Lyxor MSCI India UCITS ETF
summary: This is an exchange-traded fund (ETF) that tracks the performance of the MSCI India index, offering investors exposure to the Indian equity market. The fund is managed by Lyxor and adheres to UCITS regulations, ensuring a level of investor protection. The ETF aims to replicate the index by holding a portfolio of stocks that mirrors the index's composition.

name: Lyxor UCITS ETF Pan Africa
summary: This is an exchange-traded fund (ETF) providing exposure to a broad range of African equities outside of South Africa, tracking the performance of a relevant index. The fund is managed by Lyxor and is UCITS compliant. The ETF allows investors to participate in the growth potential of the African continent excluding South Africa, through a diversified portfolio.

name: Multi Units France - Lyxor World Water UCITS ETF
summary: This is an exchange-traded fund (ETF) that tracks the performance of companies involved in the water industry worldwide, providing exposure to water-related infrastructure, utilities, and technology. The fund is managed by Lyxor and complies with UCITS regulations. The ETF allows investors to gain exposure to the growing water sector through a diversified portfolio of global companies.

name: Lyxor New Energy UCITS ETF
summary: This is an exchange-traded fund (ETF) that tracks the performance of companies involved in the new energy sector, including renewable energy sources and related technologies. The fund is managed by Lyxor and adheres to UCITS regulations. The ETF provides investors with a way to participate in the growth of the clean energy sector through a diversified portfolio.

name: Multi Units Luxembourg - Lyxor S&P 500 VIX Futures Enhanced Roll UCITS ETF
summary: This is an exchange-traded fund (ETF) that tracks an index of VIX futures, providing exposure to the implied volatility of the S&P 500 index. The fund is managed by Lyxor and is UCITS compliant. The ETF allows investors to gain exposure to market volatility through a futures-based strategy.

name: Multi Units Luxembourg - Lyxor MSCI Eastern Europe Ex Russia UCITS ETF
summary: This is an exchange-traded fund (ETF) that tracks the performance of the MSCI Eastern Europe ex Russia index, providing exposure to the equity markets of Eastern European countries excluding Russia. The fund is managed by Lyxor and adheres to UCITS regulations. The ETF offers investors a way to invest in the growth potential of Eastern European economies outside of Russia.

name: Lyxor EURO STOXX 50 UCITS ETF
summary: This is an exchange-traded fund (ETF) that tracks the performance of the EURO STOXX 50 index, providing exposure to the 50 largest companies in the Eurozone. The fund is managed by Lyxor and is UCITS compliant. The ETF allows investors to gain broad exposure to the leading companies in the Eurozone through a single investment vehicle.

name: Ossiam Lux - Ossiam iStoxx Europe Minimum Variance NR
summary: The Ossiam iStoxx Europe Minimum Variance NR is a fund managed by Ossiam Lux that aims to provide investors with exposure to European equities while minimizing portfolio volatility. The fund constructs a portfolio using a quantitative approach to select stocks from the iStoxx Europe 600 Index that, when combined, are expected to have the lowest possible variance. It employs a minimum variance strategy to reduce risk.

name: Ossiam Lux - Ossiam Shiller Barclays CAPE US Sector Value Trust
summary: The Ossiam Shiller Barclays CAPE US Sector Value Trust, managed by Ossiam Lux, seeks to track the performance of an index that selects undervalued sectors in the US equity market based on the Shiller CAPE ratio. The fund focuses on sectors with attractive valuations relative to their historical earnings, providing exposure to undervalued segments of the US economy. This offers a value-oriented investment approach.

name: Invesco Markets plc - Invesco RDX UCITS ETF
summary: The Invesco RDX UCITS ETF aims to replicate the performance of the RDX index, providing exposure to the most liquid stocks of companies in the Central and Eastern European (CEE) region. This ETF allows investors to participate in the growth of the emerging markets within CEE. The ETF is managed to provide a cost-efficient and transparent investment solution for accessing the CEE stock market.

name: SSgA SPDR ETFs Europe I Public Limited Company - SPDR S&P Euro Dividend Aristocrats UCITS ETF
summary: The SPDR S&P Euro Dividend Aristocrats UCITS ETF seeks to track the performance of the S&P Euro Dividend Aristocrats Index, which includes companies in the Eurozone that have consistently increased their dividends for at least 10 consecutive years. The fund offers exposure to dividend-paying companies within the Eurozone. State Street Global Advisors is the issuer.

name: SSgA SPDR ETFs Europe I Public Limited Company - SPDR S&P US Dividend Aristocrats UCITS ETF
summary: The SPDR S&P US Dividend Aristocrats UCITS ETF seeks to track the performance of the S&P US Dividend Aristocrats Index, which includes companies in the United States that have consistently increased their dividends for at least 20 consecutive years. The fund offers exposure to dividend-paying companies within the US market. State Street Global Advisors is the issuer.
